description_long: This object is a modern, compact shotgun with a robust, tactical design. The main body features a metallic gold finish with black accents, including a black polymer pistol grip and trigger guard. The barrel is cylindrical and appears reinforced, with a solid, industrial look and some engraved markings on the side. The receiver area is blocky and angular, with venting details and a rail-like structure on top, suggesting compatibility with attachments. The trigger guard is large and rounded, providing ample space for gloved fingers, and the grip is ergonomically shaped for secure handling. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A compact, gold and black tactical shotgun with a robust metal body, ergonomic pistol grip, and large rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the gold metallic barrel, engraved markings, black pistol grip, and large rounded trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the cylindrical barrel opening and the width of the receiver, with the grip and trigger guard mostly obscured.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the gold barrel, black grip, and the blocky receiver with venting details.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the rail-like structure on top of the receiver and the overall compactness of the shotgun.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded trigger guard with smooth contours and ample space
